note: Declarative targeted-failure-injection manifest for scripts/run-failure-injection.ps1 (Phase 5 Slice 1). Each case is a self-contained SCENARIO that runs the REAL production boundary in a throwaway temp dir/repo, records a baseline BEFORE injecting, injects a real dependency/persistence failure, proves it triggered, verifies canonical + prior-good + unrelated data, re-runs the baseline, and prints ONE JSON result. Real product data, chats, .cockpit state, the project registry, and real git history are NEVER touched. Not a chaos framework and not exhaustive fault coverage — only these hand-picked boundaries.

cases.priority: an interrupted paired-state transaction is completed by journal replay
cases.injectedFault: kill after only task-state advanced; a write-ahead journal for the newer paired update remains

cases.priority: a corrupt/incomplete state journal is refused (never replays garbage)
cases.injectedFault: a malformed journal / invalid payload envelope

cases.priority: a corrupt current chat store recovers from a valid prior generation; mutations blocked
cases.injectedFault: the current chats.json generation is structurally corrupted (valid .prev exists)

cases.priority: an atomic-write prev-preserve/install failure fails closed without destroying data
cases.injectedFault: fs.renameSync throws when installing the .prev generation (real fs-call interception)

cases.priority: unreadable git/remote truth never yields a false backed-up/synced/green claim
cases.injectedFault: non-repository directory and a repo with no remote

cases.priority: malformed / mismatched / unreachable CI evidence is never green; only exact-SHA passed is
cases.injectedFault: no-remote/not-github (real ps1) + malformed shape / mismatched sha / unavailable (real js mapper)
